steps.title: Add the land areas
steps.content:
Add the five land areas from the table.
$$2.0+21+61+26+0.44=110.44$$

steps.title: Find the mean
steps.content: Divide by the $5$ countries, then round to the nearest square kilometer. $$\frac{110.44}{5}=22.088$$ The nearest whole number is $22$. The answer is B.
